prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次约16178→17072→16934→22625→12852，2024年大幅后移至22625名，2025年强势回升至12852名，波动剧烈；近两年波动幅度达9773名，反映 该校在浙江的报考热度存在较大不确定性；2025年基准约12852名；本省计划2021–2025年分别为224、224、223、225、230人，总体小幅增长；2026年计 划215人，较2025年减少15人，缩招约6.5%，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第36名，近年排名稳定在33–38之间，属中上水平211 ，工科实力突出；近年声誉评价偏中性/混合，无明显负面舆情事件；抖音关注度一般（总排名第65，综合热度472,008），未见明显投档断档或爆冷记录，报考 心理相对平稳；化学工程与技术A+、光学工程A-、控制科学与工程A-、机械工程A-，共4个A-及以上学科；化工为王牌，控制、光学、机械与该校电子信息类、 自动化类、兵器类等招生专业高度关联，对工科考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐 ，南京理工大学作为传统工科强校受益明显；本省2026年考生总数约400,000，较2025年290,790大幅增加约109,210人（+37.6%），竞争显著加剧；南京理工大学位于江苏南京，与浙江相邻，对浙江考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在浙江招生占比约1 .5%（2025年），属外省招生中等水平，无特殊地域偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次12852、2026年缩招约6.5%（使位次数字减小）、本省考生总数大幅增加约37.6% （使位次数字增大）等因素，考生规模激增带来的竞争加剧效应超过缩招的缓解效应，预计2026年最低位次较；预测最低位次约12749名，区 间12249–13249名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学（第一学年江阴，第二学年起南京）
- 计算机类（第一学年江阴，第二学年起南京。含计算机科学与技术、软件工程、智能科学与技术）
- 机器人工程（第一学年江阴，第二学年起南京）
- 电子信息类（第一学年江阴，第二学年起南京。含电子科学与技术、电子信息工程、光电信息科学与工程、通信工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 兵器类（第一学年江阴，第二学年起南京。含弹药工程与爆炸技术、武器系统与工程）
- 自动化类（第一学年江阴，第二学年起南京。含轨道交通信号与控制、自动化、电气工程及其自动化、智能电网信息工程）
- 智能制造工程（江阴校区）
- 机械类（第一学年江阴，第二学年起南京。含车辆工程、工业工程、机械工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 大数据管理与应用（第一学年江阴，第二学年起南京）
- 能源动力类（第一学年江阴，第二学年起南京。含储能科学与工程、能源与动力工程）
- 数学类（第一学年江阴，第二学年起南京。含信息与计算科学、数学与应用数学、应用统计学）
- 新能源科学与工程（江阴校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间12249–13249名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考目标（自动化类、兵器类、智能制造工程），一档专业（计算机类、电子信息类、法学）作为冲刺，三档专业（能 源动力类、数学类、大数据管理与应用）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<12249名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>13249名）建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 minimum rankings approximately 16178→17072→16934→22625→12852, with a significant backward shift to 22625 in 2024 and a strong recovery to 12852 in 2025, showing high volatility; the fluctuation range in the past two years is 9773 places, reflecting considerable uncertainty in the popularity of this university among Zhejiang candidates; the 2025 baseline is approximately 12852; provincial enrollment plans for 2021–2025 are 224, 224, 223, 225, 230 respectively, with a slight overall increase; the 2026 plan is 215, a decrease of 15 from 2025, a reduction of about 6.5%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 36th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable ranking between 33–38 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities, with outstanding engineering strength; recent reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion incidents; Douyin attention is average (overall ranking 65, comprehensive heat 472,008), no obvious enrollment gaps or cold records, relatively stable candidate psychology; Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Optical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, a total of 4 A- and above disciplines; Chemical Engineering is the flagship, Control, Optics, and Mechanical Engineering are highly related to the university's enrollment majors such as Electronic Information, Automation, and Weaponry, strongly attracting engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly popular, benefiting Nanjing University of Science and Technology as a traditional engineering powerhouse; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is approximately 400,000, a significant increase of about 109,210 (+37.6%) from 290,790 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition; Nanjing University of Science and Technology is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, adjacent to Zhejiang, with strong regional appeal to Zhejiang candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Zhejiang is about 1.5% (2025), a moderate level for out-of-province enrollment, with no special regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 12852, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 6.5% (which decreases the ranking number), and the significant increase in the total number of candidates in the province by about 37.6% (which increases the ranking number), the intensified competition from the surge in candidate numbers outweighs the easing effect of the enrollment reduction. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 12749, with a range of 12249–13249.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Law (First year in Jiangyin, from second year in Nanjing)
- Computer Science (First year in Jiangyin, from second year in Nanjing. Includes Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Robotics Engineering (First year in Jiangyin, from second year in Nanjing)
- Electronic Information (First year in Jiangyin, from second year in Nanjing. Includes Electronic Science and Technology, Electronic Information Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Communication Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Weaponry (First year in Jiangyin, from second year in Nanjing. Includes Ammunition Engineering and Explosion Technology, Weapon Systems and Engineering)
- Automation (First year in Jiangyin, from second year in Nanjing. Includes Rail Transit Signal and Control, Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Smart Grid Information Engineering)
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering (Jiangyin Campus)
- Mechanical Engineering (First year in Jiangyin, from second year in Nanjing. Includes Vehicle Engineering, Industrial Engineering, Mechanical Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Big Data Management and Application (First year in Jiangyin, from second year in Nanjing)
- Energy and Power (First year in Jiangyin, from second year in Nanjing. Includes Energy Storage Science and Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering)
- Mathematics (First year in Jiangyin, from second year in Nanjing. Includes Information and Computing Science, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Statistics)
- New Energy Science and Engineering (Jiangyin Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 12249–13249, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Weaponry, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering) as the main targets, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Law) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Energy and Power, Mathematics, Big Data Management and Application) as safe backups. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<12249), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; for rankings near the upper limit (>13249), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 backups.

_translation.university_name_en: Nanjing University of Science and Technology
